title: Daily finance and technology brief sample
deck: Strong US jobs data repriced rate expectations while AI and semiconductor stocks came under pressure.
daily_summary_zh: Sample daily brief for website V1. The real news supply workflow will replace this file with the full Traditional Chinese daily brief JSON.

hot_topics.topic: Strong jobs data reprices Fed risk and pressures AI stocks
hot_topics.one_line_reason: Macro data, rate expectations and technology valuation pressure merged into the main market focus.
hot_topics.reporter_angle: Watch whether strong employment data changes market pricing for the next FOMC cycle.

hot_topics.topic: AI and semiconductor valuation gets retested
hot_topics.one_line_reason: Chip selloff and AI capex return concerns appeared at the same time.
hot_topics.reporter_angle: Compare Nvidia, Broadcom, AMD and cloud capex guidance.

hot_topics.topic: Huawei Cloud pushes Agentic AI infrastructure
hot_topics.one_line_reason: China AI competition is moving from models to enterprise agent platforms.
hot_topics.reporter_angle: Track Huawei Cloud, Alibaba Cloud and Tencent Cloud enterprise agent platforms.

hot_topics.topic: LatePost tracks embodied AI, AI education and SaaS disruption
hot_topics.one_line_reason: Useful background for China AI application trends.
hot_topics.reporter_angle: Use as a weekend topic bank for deeper analysis.

items.title_original: Wall Street ends sharply lower as jobs data fuels rate hike fears
items.title_zh: Strong jobs data pressures US equities and AI stocks
items.summary_zh: Strong jobs data lifted rate concerns and pressured high-valuation technology shares.
key_facts: Rate expectations moved against growth equities.
items.market_impact: Higher-for-longer rates pressure long-duration AI and technology valuations.
items.reporter_angle: Track whether this becomes a broader repricing of AI valuation risk.
items.tracking_value: Track Treasury yields, CPI, FOMC signals and tech rebound strength.

items.title_original: Nasdaq falls as chips tumble after hot jobs report
items.title_zh: Chip stocks tumble as AI trade is tested
items.summary_zh: The AI semiconductor trade came under pressure as rates moved higher.
key_facts: Theme is cross-checked through related market reports.
items.market_impact: The AI trade is being measured against capex return and discount-rate pressure.
items.reporter_angle: Compare how sources frame the AI pullback.
items.tracking_value: Track Nvidia, Broadcom, AMD, Marvell and cloud capex guidance.

items.title_original: June 2026 technology headlines include AI cloud, AI apps and AI startups
items.title_zh: TechCrunch tracks AI cloud, AI apps and startups

key_facts: Market valuation pressure is a separate but connected issue.

items.reporter_angle: Contrast industry expansion with public-market valuation pressure.

items.title_original: Huawei Cloud discusses Agentic AI infrastructure

items.title_original: US May nonfarm payrolls beat expectations and rate-cut odds fall
items.title_zh: US jobs beat expectations and rate-cut odds fall
items.summary_zh: Stronger employment data reduced rate-cut expectations and affected bonds, USD and gold.
